ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date and time of patient admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date and time of patient discharge */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department where the patient is admitted (e.g., ICU, Emergency) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Patient's medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Patient's allergies */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* Current medications of the patient */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Patient's contact information (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department within the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lab technician, nurse, physician) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient ID */,
  "charttime" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab result was recorded */,
  "pcl" REAL /* Partial pressure of carbon dioxide in blood (PCL) */,
  "pk" REAL /* Potassium concentration in blood (PK) */,
  "plco2" REAL /* Partial pressure of carbon dioxide in blood (PLCO2) */,
  "pna" REAL /* Sodium concentration in blood (PNA) */,
  "hct" REAL /* Hematocrit (HCT) */,
  "hgb" REAL /* Hemoglobin concentration (HGB) */,
  "mcv" REAL /* Mean corpuscular volume (MCV) */,
  "plt" REAL /* Platelet count (PLT) */,
  "wbc" REAL /* White blood cell count (WBC) */,
  "rdw" REAL /* Red cell distribution width (RDW) */,
  "pbun" REAL /* Blood urea nitrogen (PBUN) */,
  "pcre" REAL /* Creatinine concentration (PCRE) */,
  "pglu" REAL /* Glucose concentration (PGLU) */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the lab result (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "lab_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab technician who processed the lab result */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_labs_lab_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_labs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the lab result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the lab result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, print) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the lab result was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES patient_labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the laboratory instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the laboratory test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the laboratory test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab result entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory test */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the lab result */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the lab result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the lab result (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_lab_results_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES patient_labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_lab_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES lab_tests ("test_id")
)
